mapper.select: select p.id, p.ent_code, p.out_put_id, p.unit_id, p.sort_order, p.point_name, p.point_type, p.data_type, p.address, p.register_address, p.coefficient, p.unit, p.min_value, p.max_value, p.precision, p.status, p.description, p.update_time, e.ent_name, i.out_put_code, i.out_put_name, ei.ent_code as ent_item_code, ei.ent_name as ent_item_name from t_ent_plc_info p left join t_bas_enterprise e on e.ent_code = p.ent_code left join t_ent_out_put_info i on i.out_put_id = p.out_put_id left join t_bas_enterprise ei on ei.ent_code = i.ent_code where p.ent_code = #{entCode} order by p.sort_order desc
select ent_code from t_ent_plc_info where unit_id = #{unitId} and ent_code != #{entCode} limit 1
select p.id, p.address, p.register_address from t_ent_plc_info p where p.ent_code = (select ent_code from t_ent_plc_info where id = #{id})
mapper.insert:
insert into t_ent_plc_info (ent_code, out_put_id, unit_id, sort_order, point_name, point_type, data_type, address, register_address, coefficient, unit, min_value, max_value, `precision`, status, description, update_time) values
(#{item.entCode}, #{item.outPutId}, #{item.unitId}, #{item.sortOrder}, #{item.pointName}, #{item.pointType}, #{item.dataType}, #{item.address}, #{item.registerAddress}, #{item.coefficient}, #{item.unit}, #{item.minValue}, #{item.maxValue}, #{item.precision}, #{item.status}, #{item.description}, now())
